case_title: CAROL A. WEDEMEYER VS. DELTA AIRLINES INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-02-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO FEB-15-2017 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF.
